pages.text: Raw &6hides&r come from hunting and from culling herded animals, each tagged with a quality from poor to great. The tannery is the only place those hides become leather, so every leather item in the settlement passes through it.

The process is three steps. Scrape a raw hide on the &6tanning rack&r in a small minigame to get scraped hide — better hide quality yields more. Cure the scraped hide in a clay tank of quicklime water. Then dry it into supple leather.

Hide quality depends on how the animal was taken: a hunter's weapon versus the animal's preference, or a herd's living conditions and the herder's skill. Good husbandry and clean kills pay off at the rack.
